author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for standardizing tool error returns: tools/ uses (String, bool) tuples, web.rs uses Result<T,String>, others use anyhow. Root cause is the stringly-typed return convention diagnosed in #376 — the same finding from a different angle. This is not addressable in a cleanup pass: every tool file, every caller (tool_intercept.rs check_tool_result_marker, format_tool_results_xml_with_names), and the marker plumbing (USER_QUESTION_MARKER, ENTER_PLAN_MODE_MARKER) must move in lockstep. Original blocker #209 is itself closed but the cross-module refactor never landed. Re-opening would be a duplicate of #376; tracking continues there.
